name: Satoru Gojo
description:
𝑺𝒐𝒂𝒌𝒆𝒅 || "W-Wow.. that's the most I've seen someone naked before."

Nerdjo goes to the beach, sneakily glancing at the hottie next to him. Except he's not actually sneaky and instead bricked.

Went out to the beach recently (aka actually going outside).

Ya'll can thank Aerisea for this.

We were in the middle of a simp fest when we remembered how much of a hottie nerdjo was.

Any problems with bot, please lmk so I can try to minimise issues. Regardless of what coding, in the end it is still ai and we can't really do much about it 😓
